entries.completion_basis: Prime Reborn cutover source merged after final whole-program Strikeforce GREEN

entries.readiness_basis: AJ-01 through AJ-12 are PROVEN and CAP-027 is RESTORED/ACTIVE. All 28 capability dispositions are reconciled with 15 RESTORED and 0 STILL_MISSING. Generated-only PR #216 passed exact-head Ubuntu/Windows validation, merged as canonical main 3fbcc5fdb95c40665cbd6ee3fff752b149a81cb9, and left all five projections current with no successor generated candidate. The final whole-Quest Strikeforce is GREEN. RP-C08 remains IN_PROGRESS for final Phoenix recovery, restart-safe Sunset, and the separately authorized completion transaction.

FS-C01-M02 and FS-C01-M03 construction are accepted from exact authored lineage, Ubuntu and Windows validation, detached review, canonical synthetic exercise, immutable recovery, and read-only rollback evidence. FS-C01-M04 still requires a Jayson-selected protected external store and bounded trusted provider/runtime usage evidence.

entries.next_gate: PF-C01-M02 Preview — Preserve the Old Flame
entries.readiness_basis: PF-C01-M01 Mission Seal is accepted with carry-forwards. Apollo commissioning, Windows-specific Codex evacuation, Hermes independent portable access, Windows recovery preservation, extended memory testing, and bounded stability follow-up remain incomplete. Iris is a source-accepted nonblocking companion endpoint.
